name: budget-planner-ai
description: Comprehensive budget planning with tracking, goals, and analytics.

tools.name: create_budget
tools.description: Create a monthly budget with category allocations

tools.name: add_income
tools.description: Record income for a budget period

tools.name: get_budget_status
tools.description: Get budget status for a month

tools.name: update_goal_progress
tools.description: Add contribution to a savings goal

tools.name: get_goals
tools.description: Get all savings goals with progress

tools.name: set_budget_alert
tools.description: Set spending alert threshold for a category

tools.name: rollover_unused
tools.description: Rollover unused budget to next month
